# Philips PowerPoint

The standard Philips presentation theme based on the sample corporate slide deck, using brand blue, white, and light gray with restrained, spacious layouts.

## Color Palette

- **Philips Blue**: `#0B5ED7` - Primary brand background and headline color
- **White**: `#FFFFFF` - Main text and clean canvas color
- **Pale cyan**: `BDF0FF` - Split-layout background panels and neutral content fields, divider slides
- **Very dark blue**: `#00126E` - Split-layout background panels and neutral content fields, divider slides, title color on light background
- **Black**: `#111111` - Body copy on light slides

## Typography

- **Headers**: Neue Frutiger World Thin or Calibri Light
- **Body Text**: Calibri

## Best Used For

Corporate presentations, leadership decks, internal strategy reviews, customer-facing Philips slideware, and any artifact that needs to look like an official Philips presentation.
